target: (Just before the battle with the Shadow…)

(When everyone had gathered in the gymnasium
right after showing Ushio's memories)
Shinpei, hurry and share the memories with everyone!
("I chose to die as a human.")
(That's what the Shadow Tokiko said at that time.)

(The time has already been set…
I can't save Tokiko anymore)

Is it really Tokiko…?
She's become a Shadow!

That Shadow who became Tokiko…
Don't you think she's different from my Shadow?

That's right!
It was like the real Tokiko…

No, really, it was the real one…
That's impossible, right!?

If it was just a Shadow, looking at me who was about to die,
it wouldn't have looked that pained!
Right!?
Could it be that she was acting to confuse you?

That wasn't acting!
We can tell!

Could it be… the same as my mother?
Even as a Shadow, she's the same as when she was human…
Maybe… the Shadow Tokiko is intentionally adjusting information and emotions.

I see.
That would be better than making the Shadow act poorly.
It would be more likely to manipulate us.

The closer the relationship with the opponent,
the more effective it is.

(Even as a Shadow, Tokiko has been deceived into thinking she's saving her mother…
Is that the case?)

Everyone, this isn't the time to be careless!
Hurry and free Tokiko!

Ah, that's right.
This time for sure…

You, the limit of the loop is approaching, isn't it?
How many chances are left?
Probably, this is the last one.

This, is the last one!?
If that's the case, if Shinpei-kun dies next…

Don't tell me that!
It's definitely not, right!?

Every time the loop happens, the cliff crumbles.
I can feel the edges of time disappearing.

When I looped earlier,
the cliff was approaching so close I could see it.

If I die next,
the loop will take me beyond the dark cliff.

There'll be no footing there,
and I'll fall into an endless darkness…
Is that the case?

Heine also noticed that,
and is coming to take his life.
It's safe to assume it's true.

M-magic…?
This is… the last chance!

Whether it's the end or not,
the action we should take is the same.
Right, Shinpei Ajiro.

Hello, Shinpei-kun, I'm sorry I'm late.
I was late because I had to gather everyone.
(And again… the battle at school began)
(Heine and the others didn't show significantly different movements)

(If I do the same as last time,
they'll decide to kill me again)

(We also did the same as last time with Ryunosuke, Nezu,
Tetsu, Kaori, and let Shide take over,
we headed to the gymnasium)
(But from here on, it's different from last time)

(Last time, Sou and Mio, I
were before the shadows called 'Roz' and 'Gil'
couldn't move a muscle)

(First, I hit Ushio against Roz and Gil,
it was correct!)

(It seems Tokiko doesn't have
the memory of the 7th battle)

(That means… Sou's desperate calls also,
she doesn't remember…)

(If that's the case,
it's definitely Ushio and me…)

(About the events at Hiruko Cave,
the link with Heine--the ability to break the control,
I have to tell Tokiko!)

Heine is betraying Tokiko!!
I saw it with my own eyes!

(Tokiko's reaction is the same as before.
Eventually her confusion will reach its peak)

(We'll fully exploit that crack,
and seize the chance for victory!)
Do I need to listen to…!

Tokiko!
Don't listen to their stories!

Ah… Tokiko's thing,
I should have left her alone.
(Good, they've successfully captured the Shadow Mio!)

Big sister, Shin-chan!
Since this side is already over,
help you on the other side!
Tokiko, aren't you going to surrender yet?

Don't let your guard down, Mio.
Tokiko still has a gun, I bet.

Tokiko, you heard from Shinpei, right!
You're being deceived by Heine and the others!

How many times do I have to say it!?
You'll know if you see Ushio's memories!

Shinpei and Ushio have looped many times,
changed the future!

Believe in Shinpei!
Even if the future where you're betrayed,
Shinpei and Ushio will definitely change it!

Hey, Tokiko.
Please, listen carefully to our story,
and listen, okay?

No, I failed…
It's because she has the same face as my sister,
I can't shoot her!

Big brother…
You tried to set me up!?

I did it!
I took out another one too!

Hey, Tokiko.
If it's come to this, just accept it—
Is that gun your last trick?

No…!
Even without this, I won't lose to you, brother.
Even without that, I won't lose to you, right?
Then, throw away that gun. Then listen properly to what Shinpei and Ushio have to say.
In the end… if I can't trust what Ushio and others said?
Then… yes, kill me. I won't resist at all.
It's okay. If you don't have this resolve, you can't talk to the current Tokiko.
I'm begging you with my life. I expect a good answer.
Really, always like that, you're putting on a good show.
Hey, putting on a good show…
It's okay, brother. I'll listen to the story.
I'll leave this gun. Do whatever you want with it.
Then, right away… Ushio, I'm counting on you.
Leave it to me! This is why I can't!
An infinite firing copy gun? Isn't that a waste?
No, this is fine. I won't let anyone have that.
But I have a connection with Heine…
I told you, right? Ushio can cut the connection with Heine.
If that's the case… I'm asking you, Ushio.
Yes, the connection with Heine— if we cut the link, you'll be free, Toki-chan.
Then I'll show you my memories. You'll understand everything.
Good… I'm glad… Oh, I'm so glad!
What's wrong with you, Sou? You're losing your nerve!
Y-yeah, stop being so loud… I just let my guard down…
It was long… I'm glad she finally understood.
Yep, now things will be okay with Tokiko.

Tokiko
Apply shadow sewing to Tokiko
Tokichan, take it easy for a while.
It's not that painful, so relax.
What's wrong with you, Shinpei! Free Tokiko quickly!
Don't be scared! Leave it to Ushio and Shinpei, there's no problem.
"(D-Damn… How can I… put a nail in the shadow of the shadow Tokiko in this situation?)"
U-uh, nothing. Ushio, I'm counting on you later.
